title: Accelerating the cyber defense ecosystem that protects us all
summary: Leading security firms and enterprises join OpenAI’s Trusted Access for Cyber, using GPT-5.4-Cyber and $10M in API grants to strengthen global cyber defense.
title_es: OpenAI lanza GPT-5.4-Cyber y programa de defensa cibernética
bajada: OpenAI presentó GPT-5.4-Cyber, un modelo especializado en ciberseguridad, junto con $10M en grants de API para empresas y firmas de seguridad. La iniciativa busca fortalecer la defensa cibernética global a través de su programa Trusted Access for Cyber.
bajada_en: OpenAI unveiled GPT-5.4-Cyber, a specialized model for cybersecurity, alongside $10M in API grants for enterprises and security firms. The initiative aims to strengthen global cyber defense through its Trusted Access for Cyber program.

title: Canva’s AI 2.0 update goes all in on prompt-powered design tools
summary: Canva has overhauled its design and workspace suite as it attempts to become the ultimate centralized hub for AI-powered content creation. The platform announced its Canva AI 2.0 update today, introducing updated tools and new prompt-based editing capabilities that allow users to make or adjust their work by describing what they want to create to […]
title_es: Canva AI 2.0: rediseño completo enfocado en edición por prompts
bajada: Canva lanzó su actualización AI 2.0 con nuevas herramientas y capacidades de edición basadas en prompts. La plataforma se posiciona como hub centralizado para creación de contenido potenciada por IA.
bajada_en: Canva launched its AI 2.0 update with new tools and prompt-based editing capabilities. The platform positions itself as a centralized hub for AI-powered content creation.

title: Adobe embraces conversational AI editing, marking a ‘fundamental shift’ in creative work
summary: Adobe is fully embracing AI tools that enable creators to edit their work using descriptive prompts, instead of manually using specific Creative Cloud apps. The software giant's new Firefly AI Assistant allows users to describe what they want to change by typing their own words into a conversational interface. Adobe says this marks a "fundamental […]
title_es: Adobe introduce edición conversacional con Firefly AI Assistant
bajada: Adobe presentó su nuevo Firefly AI Assistant que permite a creadores editar contenido usando descripciones conversacionales en lugar de herramientas manuales. La compañía lo describe como un cambio fundamental en cómo se trabaja en Creative Cloud.
bajada_en: Adobe unveiled its new Firefly AI Assistant enabling creators to edit content using conversational descriptions instead of manual tools. The company describes it as a fundamental shift in how Creative Cloud is used.

title: The next evolution of the Agents SDK
summary: OpenAI updates the Agents SDK with native sandbox execution and a model-native harness, helping developers build secure, long-running agents across files and tools.
title_es: OpenAI mejora Agents SDK con ejecución en sandbox nativa
bajada: OpenAI actualizó su SDK de agentes con ejecución de código segura en sandbox y un harness nativo del modelo. Los desarrolladores ahora pueden construir agentes de larga duración más seguros que interactúen con archivos y herramientas externas.
bajada_en: OpenAI upgraded its Agents SDK with native sandbox execution and model-native harness for secure code execution. Developers can now build safer, long-running agents that interact with files and external tools.

title: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS: the next generation of expressive AI speech
summary: Gemini logo next to the text "3.1 Flash TTS", all over colored dots
title_es: Google presenta Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS con síntesis de voz expresiva
bajada: Google lanzó Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS, la próxima generación de síntesis de voz con capacidades más expresivas y naturales. Esta herramienta amplía las capacidades multimodales de Gemini para aplicaciones de voz.
bajada_en: Google launched Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS, the next generation of text-to-speech with more expressive and natural voice capabilities. This tool expands Gemini's multimodal capabilities for voice applications.

title: Canva’s AI assistant can now call various tools to make designs for you
summary: The latest version of Canva's AI assistant lets users create editable designs with text prompts.
title_es: Canva integra herramientas de IA para diseño con prompts
bajada: Canva mejoró su asistente de IA para permitir a usuarios crear diseños editables directamente desde descripciones en lenguaje natural. La herramienta puede ahora invocar múltiples funciones para automatizar tareas de diseño complejas.
bajada_en: Canva enhanced its AI assistant to let users create editable designs directly from natural language descriptions. The tool can now invoke multiple functions to automate complex design tasks.

title: DeepL, known for text translation, now wants to translate your voice
summary: DeepL says its tech could be used for real-time translation with meeting tools like Zoom and Microsoft Teams
title_es: DeepL expande su plataforma hacia traducción de voz en tiempo real
bajada: DeepL, conocida por su servicio de traducción de textos, anunció capacidades de traducción de voz para herramientas como Zoom y Microsoft Teams. La solución permitiría traducción en tiempo real en reuniones profesionales.
bajada_en: DeepL, known for text translation, announced voice translation capabilities for tools like Zoom and Microsoft Teams. The solution would enable real-time translation in professional meetings.

title: Treating enterprise AI as an operating layer
summary: There’s a fault line running through enterprise AI, and it’s not the one getting the most attention. The public conversation still tracks foundation models and benchmarks — GPT versus Gemini, reasoning scores, and marginal capability gains. But in practice, the more durable advantage is structural: who owns the operating layer where intelligence is applied, governed,…
title_es: La ventaja estructural en IA empresarial está en la capa operativa
bajada: MIT Tech Review advierte que la verdadera brecha competitiva en IA empresarial no está en modelos, sino en quién controla la capa operativa donde se aplica y gobierna la inteligencia. Esto es más importante que incrementos marginales de capacidad.
bajada_en: MIT Tech Review argues the real competitive gap in enterprise AI isn't in models, but in who controls the operating layer where intelligence is applied and governed. This matters more than marginal capability gains.

title: Why having “humans in the loop” in an AI war is an illusion
summary: The availability of artificial intelligence for use in warfare is at the center of a legal battle between Anthropic and the Pentagon. This debate has become urgent, with AI playing a bigger role than ever before in the current conflict with Iran. AI is no longer just helping humans analyze intelligence. It is now an…
title_es: La ilusión del control humano en guerras potenciadas por IA
bajada: MIT Tech Review analiza por qué el concepto de "humans in the loop" en conflictos con IA es una ilusión, en contexto de la disputa legal entre Anthropic y el Pentágono. La IA ya cumple roles autónomos en operaciones reales.
bajada_en: MIT Tech Review examines why 'humans in the loop' in AI-powered conflicts is an illusion, amid the Anthropic-Pentagon legal dispute. AI already performs autonomous roles in real operations.

title: Training and Finetuning Multimodal Embedding & Reranker Models with Sentence Transformers
title_es: Hugging Face: entrenar modelos multimodales con Sentence Transformers
bajada: Hugging Face publicó una guía para entrenar y ajustar modelos de embedding y rerankers multimodales usando Sentence Transformers. Este recurso ayuda a developers a crear representaciones vectoriales más sofisticadas para búsqueda y ranking.
bajada_en: Hugging Face published a guide for training and fine-tuning multimodal embedding and reranker models using Sentence Transformers. This resource helps developers create more sophisticated vector representations for search and ranking.

title: Anthropic Plots Major London Expansion
summary: As tensions with the US government mount, Anthropic has leased a new office with enough space to quadruple its 200-person headcount in London.
title_es: Anthropic planea expansión masiva en Londres con nueva oficina
bajada: Anthropic arrendó una nueva oficina en Londres con capacidad para cuadruplicar su equipo de 200 personas. El movimiento se produce mientras aumentan tensiones entre la empresa y el gobierno estadounidense.
bajada_en: Anthropic leased a new London office with capacity to quadruple its 200-person team. The move comes as tensions rise between the company and the US government.

title: This simulation startup wants to be the Cursor for physical AI
summary: Antioch raised a $8.5 million seed round to create simulation tools for a new generation of robot builders.
title_es: Antioch recauda $8.5M para crear herramientas de simulación para robots
bajada: Antioch, una startup de simulación, levantó $8.5 millones en su ronda seed para desarrollar herramientas enfocadas en física de IA. La compañía se posiciona como el equivalente a Cursor pero para construcción de robots.
bajada_en: Antioch, a simulation startup, raised $8.5 million in seed funding to develop tools for physical AI. The company positions itself as the Cursor equivalent for robot builders.

title: Google launches a Gemini AI app on Mac
summary: Google is launching a new Gemini app on Mac that allows you to interact with the AI assistant without switching windows on your desktop. With the app, you can use the Option + Space shortcut to pull up a floating chat bubble, where you can ask Gemini questions and share your window. Before sharing your […]
title_es: Google lanza aplicación Gemini para macOS con acceso rápido
bajada: Google lanzó una app nativa de Gemini para Mac que permite acceder al asistente sin cambiar ventanas. Con el atajo Option + Space, usuarios pueden abrir una burbuja de chat flotante para consultas.
bajada_en: Google launched a native Gemini app for Mac enabling quick access to the AI assistant without switching windows. The Option + Space shortcut opens a floating chat bubble for queries.

title: Inside VAKRA: Reasoning, Tool Use, and Failure Modes of Agents
title_es: IBM Research: análisis de VAKRA sobre agentes de IA
bajada: Hugging Face publicó un análisis de VAKRA, un benchmark que examina el razonamiento, uso de herramientas y modos de fallo en agentes de IA. El estudio proporciona insights valiosos para developers que construyen sistemas de agentes.
bajada_en: Hugging Face published an analysis of VAKRA, a benchmark examining reasoning, tool use, and failure modes in AI agents. The study provides valuable insights for developers building agent systems.

title: Making AI operational in constrained public sector environments
summary: The AI boom has hit across industries, and public sector organizations are facing pressure to accelerate adoption. At the same time, government institutions face distinct constraints around security, governance, and operations that set them apart from their business counterparts. For this reason, purpose-built small language models (SLMs) offer a promising path to operationalize AI in…
title_es: SLMs: modelos de lenguaje pequeños para el sector público
bajada: MIT Tech Review analiza cómo los Small Language Models (SLMs) ofrecen un camino viable para operacionalizar IA en entidades públicas con restricciones de seguridad y gobernanza. Los SLMs abordan desafíos únicos del sector público.
bajada_en: MIT Tech Review explores how Small Language Models (SLMs) offer a viable path to operationalize AI in public sector entities with security and governance constraints. SLMs address unique public sector challenges.

title: Codex for (almost) everything
summary: The updated Codex app for macOS and Windows adds computer use, in-app browsing, image generation, memory, and plugins to accelerate developer workflows.
title_es: OpenAI actualiza Codex con capacidad de control de computadora
bajada: OpenAI ha mejorado significativamente su herramienta de codificación Codex con nuevas capacidades de control de desktop, generación de imágenes y memoria. La actualización busca competir directamente con Claude Code de Anthropic en el mercado de asistentes de desarrollo agenticos.
bajada_en: OpenAI has significantly upgraded its Codex coding tool with new desktop control capabilities, image generation, and memory features. The update aims to compete directly with Anthropic's Claude Code in the agentic development assistant market.

title: Introducing GPT-Rosalind for life sciences research
summary: OpenAI introduces GPT-Rosalind, a frontier reasoning model built to accelerate drug discovery, genomics analysis, protein reasoning, and scientific research workflows.
title_es: OpenAI presenta GPT-Rosalind para investigación en ciencias de la vida
bajada: OpenAI lanzó GPT-Rosalind, un modelo de razonamiento frontier especializado en aceleración del descubrimiento de fármacos, análisis genómico y investigación científica. Este modelo representa la apuesta de OpenAI en el mercado de IA para ciencias de la vida.
bajada_en: OpenAI launched GPT-Rosalind, a frontier reasoning model specialized in accelerating drug discovery, genomic analysis, and scientific research. This represents OpenAI's push into the life sciences AI market.

title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.7ProductApr 16, 2026Our latest Opus model brings stronger performance across coding, agents, vision, and multi-step tasks, with greater thoroughness and consistency on the work that matters most.
summary: Product Announcements Introducing Claude Opus 4.7 Apr 16, 2026 Our latest model, Claude Opus 4.7, is now generally available. Opus 4.7 is a notable improvement on Opus 4.6 in advanced software engineering, with particular gains on the most difficult tasks. Users report being able to hand off their hardest coding work—the kind that previously needed close supervision—to Opus 4.7 with confidence. Opus 4.7 handles complex, long-running tasks with rigor and consistency, pays precise attention to instructions, and devises ways to verify its own outputs before reporting back. The model also has substantially better vision: it can see images in greater resolution. It’s more tasteful and creative when completing professional tasks, producing higher-quality interfaces, slides, and docs. And—although it is less broadly capable than our most powerful model, Claude Mythos Preview—it shows better results than Opus 4.6 across a range of benchmarks: Last week we announced Project Glasswing , highlighting the risks—and benefits—of AI models for cybersecurity. We stated that we would keep Claude Mythos Preview’s release limited and test new cyber safeguards on less capable models first. Opus 4.7 is the first such model: its cyber capabilities are not as advanced as those of Mythos Preview (indeed, during its training we experimented with efforts to differentially reduce these capabilities). We are releasing Opus 4.7 with safeguards that automatically detect and block requests that indicate prohibited or high-risk cybersecurity uses. What we learn from the real-world deployment of these safeguards will help us work towards our eventual goal of a broad release of Mythos-class models. Security professionals who wish to use Opus 4.7 for legitimate cybersecurity purposes (such as vulnerability research, penetration testing, and red-teaming) are invited to join our new Cyber Verification Program . Opus 4.7 is available today across all Claude products and our API, Amazon Bedrock, Google C
title_es: Anthropic lanza Claude Opus 4.7 con mejoras en ingeniería de software
bajada: Claude Opus 4.7 ya está disponible, ofreciendo mejoras significativas en tareas de codificación compleja, visión mejorada y mejor seguimiento de instrucciones. El modelo es capaz de manejar trabajo de programación difícil que antes requería supervisión cercana.
bajada_en: Claude Opus 4.7 is now generally available with significant improvements in complex coding tasks, enhanced vision capabilities, and better instruction following. The model can handle difficult programming work that previously required close supervision.

title: Anthropic releases a new Opus model amid Mythos Preview buzz
summary: Anthropic has released its most powerful "generally available" model to date: Claude Opus 4.7. The company called it a step up from Opus 4.6 for advanced software engineering tasks, particularly in complex coding areas that in the past required more hand-holding. It's also supposed to be better at analyzing images and following instructions, and it […]
title_es: Anthropic libera Opus 4.7 en medio de competencia con OpenAI
bajada: Anthropic lanzó su modelo Opus 4.7 como su versión más poderosa disponible al público, enfocada en tareas de ingeniería de software avanzada. La versión mejora significativamente en análisis de imágenes y capacidades de codificación complejas.
bajada_en: Anthropic released Claude Opus 4.7 as its most powerful publicly available model, focused on advanced software engineering tasks. The version significantly improves image analysis and complex coding capabilities.

title: OpenAI takes aim at Anthropic with beefed-up Codex that gives it more power over your desktop
summary: OpenAI's agentic coding tool has gotten a major makeover, with a variety of new powers and abilities.
title_es: Competencia OpenAI vs Anthropic se intensifica con actualizaciones
bajada: La rivalidad entre OpenAI y Anthropic se agudiza mientras ambas empresas lanzan mejoras estratégicas a sus herramientas de desarrollo. OpenAI responde agresivamente a los éxitos de Claude Code con una versión mejorada de Codex.
bajada_en: The rivalry between OpenAI and Anthropic intensifies as both companies launch strategic improvements to their development tools. OpenAI is aggressively responding to Claude Code's successes with an enhanced Codex version.

title: OpenAI’s big Codex update is a direct shot at Claude Code
summary: OpenAI is beefing up its agentic coding and development system, Codex, with a suite of updates that let it use your computer, generate images, and remember from past experiences. The package of updates comes as OpenAI's rivalry with Anthropic intensifies, following the stellar successes of Claude Code and OpenAI aggressively shifting resources to catch up. […]
title_es: OpenAI potencia Codex como respuesta directa a Claude Code
bajada: OpenAI actualizó Codex con funciones de uso de computadora, generación de imágenes y memoria persistente para competir con Claude Code. Esta es parte de la estrategia de OpenAI para recuperar terreno en el segmento de herramientas agenticas.
bajada_en: OpenAI upgraded Codex with computer usage, image generation, and persistent memory features to compete with Claude Code. This is part of OpenAI's strategy to regain ground in the agentic tools segment.

title: Physical Intelligence, a hot robotics startup, says its new robot brain can figure out tasks it was never taught
summary: The new model, called π0.7, represents what the company describes as an early but meaningful step toward the long-sought goal of a general-purpose robot brain.
title_es: Physical Intelligence presenta π0.7, un cerebro robótico general
bajada: Physical Intelligence reveló π0.7, un modelo que puede aprender tareas de robótica que nunca fue entrenado a realizar. El startup describe esto como un paso significativo hacia un cerebro robótico de propósito general.
bajada_en: Physical Intelligence unveiled π0.7, a model that can learn robotics tasks it was never trained on. The startup describes this as a meaningful step toward a general-purpose robot brain.

title: Cloudflare's AI Platform: an inference layer designed for agents
summary: Article URL:https://blog.cloudflare.com/ai-platform/Comments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47792538Points: 215# Comments: 53
title_es: Cloudflare presenta plataforma de IA diseñada para agentes
bajada: Cloudflare lanzó una plataforma de IA que funciona como una capa de inferencia optimizada para sistemas agenticos. La solución busca simplificar el despliegue de modelos de IA en escala.
bajada_en: Cloudflare launched an AI platform designed as an optimized inference layer for agentic systems. The solution aims to simplify AI model deployment at scale.

title: The UK Launches Its $675 Million Sovereign AI Fund
summary: In a bid to minimize dependence on technology from other countries, the UK government is plowing resources into homegrown AI startups.
title_es: Reino Unido lanza fondo soberano de IA de $675 millones
bajada: El gobierno británico anunció un fondo de $675 millones para impulsar startups de IA locales y reducir dependencia tecnológica de otros países. Esta iniciativa refleja la creciente preocupación global sobre soberanía en IA.
bajada_en: The UK government announced a $675 million sovereign AI fund to support local AI startups and reduce technological dependence on other countries. This initiative reflects growing global concerns about AI sovereignty.

title: The Battle for OpenAI’s Soul
summary: In Musk v. Altman, a jury will soon determine whether OpenAI has strayed from its founding mission to ensure AGI benefits humanity. Here’s what to know.
title_es: Juicio Musk vs Altman examina la misión de OpenAI
bajada: Un juicio próximo determinará si OpenAI se ha desviado de su misión fundacional de beneficio general de la humanidad. El caso Musk v. Altman explora cuestiones críticas sobre gobernanza y estructura corporativa de OpenAI.
bajada_en: An upcoming trial will determine whether OpenAI has strayed from its founding mission to benefit humanity. The Musk v. Altman case explores critical questions about OpenAI's governance and corporate structure.

title: A new way to explore the web with AI Mode in Chrome
summary: AI Mode in Chrome
title_es: Google introduce AI Mode en Chrome para exploración web mejorada
bajada: Google lanzó AI Mode en Chrome, una nueva forma de explorar la web con asistencia de IA. La característica integra búsqueda y navegación con capacidades de IA conversacional.
bajada_en: Google launched AI Mode in Chrome, a new way to explore the web with AI assistance. The feature integrates search and browsing with conversational AI capabilities.

title: Google’s AI Mode update lets you open links without leaving the page
summary: Google is upgrading AI Mode in Chrome with a new feature that will allow you to open links to sources alongside your chat. Now, instead of automatically opening a new tab, clicking a source will open the website side by side with AI Mode, allowing you to ask follow-up questions about what's on the page. […]
title_es: Google mejora AI Mode con apertura de enlaces en contexto
bajada: Google mejoró AI Mode en Chrome permitiendo abrir enlaces fuente junto al chat sin cambiar de pestaña. Esta actualización facilita el seguimiento de preguntas sobre contenido web sin interrupciones.
bajada_en: Google improved AI Mode in Chrome by allowing source links to open alongside chat without switching tabs. This update makes it easier to follow up on questions about web content without interruptions.

title: Luma launches AI-powered production studio with faith-focused Wonder Project
summary: The studio's first project will be about Moses and star Academy Award-winner Ben Kingsley, to be released this spring on Prime Video.
title_es: Luma lanza estudio de producción de IA con Wonder Project
bajada: Luma anunció un estudio de producción impulsado por IA enfocado en contenido religioso, con su primer proyecto sobre Moisés protagonizado por Ben Kingsley. El proyecto se estrenará en Prime Video esta primavera.
bajada_en: Luma announced an AI-powered production studio focused on faith-based content, with its first project about Moses starring Ben Kingsley. The project will premiere on Prime Video this spring.

title: Upscale AI in talks to raise at $2B valuation, says report
summary: AI infrastructure company Upscale AI is reportedly in talks to raise its third funding round since launching just seven months ago.
title_es: Upscale AI busca financiación a valoración de $2 mil millones
bajada: Upscale AI, compañía de infraestructura de IA, está en conversaciones para una ronda de financiación a $2 mil millones solo 7 meses después de su lanzamiento. El rápido crecimiento refleja la demanda de infraestructura especializada de IA.
bajada_en: Upscale AI, an AI infrastructure company, is in talks for a funding round at a $2 billion valuation just 7 months after launch. The rapid growth reflects demand for specialized AI infrastructure.

title: Gemini can now pull from Google Photos to generate personalized images
summary: Google's Personal Intelligence feature, which lets Gemini pull data from apps like Google Photos to offer responses tailored to you, can now use that data and its Nano Banana 2 image model to create images based on your personal context. With the feature, you can use prompts like "Design my dream house" or "Create a […]
title_es: Gemini genera imágenes personalizadas usando Google Photos
bajada: Google permitió a Gemini acceder a Google Photos para generar imágenes personalizadas usando el modelo Nano Banana 2. La característica de inteligencia personal crea contenido basado en contexto individual del usuario.
bajada_en: Google enabled Gemini to access Google Photos to generate personalized images using the Nano Banana 2 model. The personal intelligence feature creates content based on individual user context.
